programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Barry questions his judgment as the bidders hunt for deals in Azusa, Calif.; Darrell scores a timeless unit; Jarrod and Brandi seek quality over quantity.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Kenny tiptoes down memory lane in Orange, Calif.; Brandi and Jarrod get to work on a tool locker; Darrell and his granddaughter dig up a creepy find.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers venture into downtown Los Angeles, where they participate in a vault auction; Jarrod and Brandi put all their marbles in some mystery boxes.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Flash Shelton and his team head to Vancouver, Washington to help a homeowner after a house sitter overstays her welcome and becomes an unwanted squatter; when Flash's team attempts to reclaim the home by using surveillance cameras, megaphones and even snakes, the confrontation turns into a tense standoff.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: A young couple in Philadelphia lists their home for sale, only to find a squatter already living in it; when confronted by Flash's team, he is completely shocked and produces a fraudulent lease; but can Flash see through the scam and help the homeowners take back what's rightfully theirs?

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In North Carolina, a shady real estate scam leaves Tamera fighting squatters who've seized her beautiful 58-acre property, with her beloved horses trapped inside; as the squatters taunt Flash and his team, tensions explode in a desperate fight to reclaim the land and rescue the animals.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Cleveland, Ray is ready to move back home-until he discovers an intruder linked to his previous tenant has taken over his house; when Flash and his team step inside, it's anything but a routine squatter removal job; the house is uninhabitable, and the danger runs far deeper than expected.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In New York, Maria turns part of her home into an apartment for her grandson-but everything unravels when a negligent tenant living under the same roof as her, refuses to vacate; after barricading the door and cutting off access to her own space, Flash and his team face the escalating battle.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Kory and Mackenzie bought land to build their future home in rural Spokane, Washington; however, squatters have taken it over and are impacting the nearby property; with the site completely trashed and interactions becoming hostile, Flash and his team step into one of their most unpredictable situations yet.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: When a stranger moves in and takes over the new home of Nabih and Kadeisha, Flash and his team are deployed to Dearborn, Michigan with one goal: out squat the squatter; but what starts as a straightforward job becomes a battle of endurance when the trespasser challenges Flash to see who can hold their ground the longest.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Flash heads to Philadelphia to help Paul, who returns from a stint in Vegas to start a family with his fiancée, only to find a stranger has taken over his Pennsylvania home; when Flash confronts multiple occupants, tensions mount, culminating in a boiling standoff.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A neighbor pushes a 12-year-old for riding his bike on the sidewalk in Santa Ana, Calif.; one woman's dream of a secluded life in rural Kentucky turns sour when neighbors lay claim to a strip of her land.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A Florida woman takes issue with neighbors who cone off the street for their bike-riding kids, disrupting her daily commute; in California a resident feuds with his Homeowners' Association while they claim he's a nuisance.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: Two bikers in Missouri are exploring an abandoned building when an angry neighbor appears and calls the police on them; an armed and nearly naked Seattle man defends his neighbor's property from thieves.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: An Idaho family's next-door neighbor goes to battle with them over the height of their lawn; in Florida, authorities carrying out a home eviction realize they are at the wrong address; a Kansas neighborhood park is terrorized by two loose dogs.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A Los Angeles couple are accused of stomping around their apartment by their downstairs neighbors who demand that they tiptoe instead; a base jumper gets his parachute twisted and gives new meaning to the term "dropping in on a neighbor.".

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In California, a routine house move turns tense when one neighbor pushes back on cul-de-sac access. In Florida, a homeowner replacing a rotting fence is met with an unusual demand: return the old boards. And in rural North Carolina, a grieving couple's search for peace unravels into threats over noisy visitors and social media posts.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A couple in Florida are terrified when their neighbor repeatedly bangs on their apartment door looking for a missing bike; a Florida man deals with a trespasser; an allegedly stolen yacht crashes into a dock full of neighbors' boats.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A neighbor in Arizona creates a stink in an ongoing dispute over trash collection in South Carolina, a woman goes to battle with her neighbors over her passion for protecting wild geese in her neighborhood.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A teenager in Washington is harangued by a neighbor when he cuts across the man's lawn; two women get into a sidewalk standoff in North Carolina; a man defends his neighborhood by fending off suspected car thieves dressed only in his underwear.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A man is unjustly accused of being an outsider when he tries to use the community trash cans; chaos ensues when two old-timers clash over the same disabled parking spot; a high school soccer player tackles a neighborhood package thief.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A couple goes head-to-head with a neighbor whose backyard bonfires keep lighting up the block; a feud flares up over backyard lights, grocery bags and everything in between; a woman's backyard barrier sets off a clash with her neighbor.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A family in Texas puts up a security light which enrages their next-door neighbor; in New York, a woman and a neighboring couple argue over the placement of their shared trash bins.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Fond du Lac, Wisconsin, a parking dispute escalates on the day a man is expecting an important delivery; in Pennsylvania, a landlord and tenant clash after a mailbox is replaced without permission; and in Brooksville, Florida, a woman's patience is in the crosshairs when her neighbor sets up a backyard shooting range.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Michigan, a dispute over shared driveway parking puts neighbors at odds; in Ohio, a simple mail mix-up sparks an outsized reaction; and in Chicago, a routine move-out inspection turns into a heated showdown between renters and their landlord.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Trey's dream home renovation turns into a nightmare when he discovers squatters have taken over his Atlanta property; after forcing out two occupants, he's left battling a defiant holdout and a brazen fake landlord scheme fueling the chaos; but when Flash and his team arrive, they quickly realize this case will require a very different approach.

programme.desc: Geoff's selling up in Spain to build a flood-resistant architectural marvel on a flood plain on the Essex coast. Will he sink or swim when Covid hits and Spain's property market collapses.

programme.title: Kirstie's House of Craft
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp shows us how to create beautiful crafts with items we already own. She transforms some fabric by dyeing it with turmeric, and embellishes an old lampshade.

programme.title: George Clarke's American Adventure
programme.desc: George Clarke explores the iconic Americana movement on a path less travelled through the USA starting in two wildly contrasting neighbour states: Louisiana and Texas.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Oti Mabuse in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Rebecca moves in with Robin and shows the Cheers gang his fancy flat while he's away. But is he using her to gather information for a corporate takeover.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Robin is arrested for insider trading and Rebecca decides to stand by him. But when she learns it was Sam who turned Robin in, she reconsiders her future at Cheers.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Love Is a Really, Really Perfectly Okay Thing: Sam tells a lie, in an attempt to protect his friendship with Rebecca.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray asks Marie to teach Debra how to make her famous meatballs, to cure his wife's culinary inferiority complex. But Ray's plan has unexpected consequences..

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray runs into money trouble when he takes over the family finances to show Debra how easy it is.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is bored when he goes for a ride in Robert's police car, but his disinterest is soon replaced by terror when they get caught in a hold-up.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier's Halloween party takes an unpleasant turn when Niles drinks a few too many beers.

programme.title: Vanessa
programme.desc: Raw, unfiltered, authentic and personal, Vanessa Feltz wants you to tell her what's on your mind. Fiery discussions, a good giggle and plenty of afternoon gossip.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: A man dressed as Santa falls from the sky while Castle and Beckett prepare for their first Christmas as a couple.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Castle investigates when a senior lawyer who specialised in divorces is killed with an icepick.

programme.title: Love Nature
programme.desc: A Red Squirrel Survival Trust volunteer discusses the work of his local group and how they are helping these indigenous animals fight back against the more aggressive grey squirrels.

programme.title: 5 News with Dan Walker
programme.desc: Join Dan Walker and the team for the news that matters to you.

programme.title: Cumbria: The Lakes & the Coast
programme.desc: Windermere gets a taste of the Caribbean when chefs Charlotte and Jeffrey cook up a Jamaica-inspired dish. Ulverston gears up for one of Europe's largest lantern festivals.

programme.title: A Yorkshire Farm
programme.desc: Spring is in the air as JB Gill takes a trip to North Ronaldsay to meet fifth-generation sheep farmers and Peter Wright travels to the prestigious Oban cattle auction.

programme.title: Reuben Owen: Life in the Dales
programme.desc: Reuben lends Jess a hand during the stressful annual tuberculosis test of her dairy herd. And Reuben thanks friends and family with a hot air balloon ride over the Dales.

programme.title: Little Disasters
programme.desc: The friends support Jess as she faces legal action, while trying to pick up the pieces of their own lives. Events come to a head at the summer fair, with a shocking final revelation.

programme.title: Our Evil Mother: The Ruby Franke Scandal
programme.desc: Revealing the fall of the 'momfluencer', who had millions of followers for her parenting tips. But behind the perfect façade was a nightmare, revealed when her son fled home.

programme.title: Britain's Most Dangerous Prisoners
programme.desc: At 6ft 7, Gary Vinter is a convicted double murderer and one of the most feared men in the English prison system. He stabbed an inmate in the eye and gave another brain damage.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A little rain doesn't stop a determined quad driver from trying to outrun police. A deputy has doubts about a man's professed distrust of banks.

programme.title: Cruise TV with LoveitBookit
programme.desc: Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one.

programme.title: Teleshopping

programme.title: Build Your Dream Home in the Country

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross has applied for a big grant, but Charlie's ex-boyfriend will decide who it goes to. Chandler lies to Joey about watching his audition tape.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe and Mike can't decide if they should donate their wedding fund to charity. Joey may inadvertently ruin Monica and Chandler's adoption prospects.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica prepares a fabulous Thanksgiving feast for the gang but is furious when everyone arrives late to the gathering.
